first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The score is the same (6/10), and both versions highlight the exact same strengths (current AI work, past high-throughput systems) and concerns (complete lack of Python, dated experience, missing operational evidence). The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in judgment based on the altered company names.
